Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve
Off Calendar May-25-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF ANTHONY HELD's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement is GRANTED. No opposition filed and the motion complies with the Health & Safety Code. Order and Judgment signed in open court. Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600 =302/ru
